turtlename
	newdocstr
parexpr
_turtle_docreviseK
screennamer
_screen_docreviseW
def {name}{paramslist}:
    if {obj} is None:
        if not TurtleScreen._RUNNING:
            TurtleScreen._RUNNING = True
            raise Terminator
        {obj} = {init}
    try:
        return {obj}.{name}{argslist}
    except TK.TclError:
        if not TurtleScreen._RUNNING:
            TurtleScreen._RUNNING = True
            raise Terminator
        raise
>>>>>>)
